name: Business Email Compromise (BEC)
description: Attack tree modelling a Business Email Compromise operation targeting CEO fraud, invoice redirect, and payroll diversion through email account takeover and social engineering
root_objective: Conduct fraudulent financial transactions via compromised or spoofed business email

nodes.title: Execute Business Email Compromise
nodes.description: Achieve fraudulent wire transfers, invoice payments, or payroll diversions through email-based deception

nodes.title: Compromise Executive Email Account
nodes.description: Gain access to a C-suite or senior management email account

nodes.title: Credential Phishing with AitM Proxy
nodes.description: Use adversary-in-the-middle proxy to capture executive's credentials and session token, bypassing MFA

nodes.title: Token Theft via Malicious OAuth App
nodes.description: Trick executive into consenting to a malicious app that grants persistent mailbox access

nodes.title: Reconnaissance and Targeting
nodes.description: Monitor email to identify payment workflows, invoice patterns, and key financial contacts

nodes.title: Set Up Mail Forwarding Rule
nodes.description: Create a hidden inbox rule that forwards copies of all emails to an attacker-controlled address

nodes.title: Map Payment Approval Chain
nodes.description: Identify who approves payments, which vendors are paid regularly, and typical invoice amounts

nodes.title: Execute Fraudulent Payment Request
nodes.description: Send the fraudulent email requesting a wire transfer or payment change

nodes.title: CEO Fraud Wire Transfer
nodes.description: Impersonate CEO emailing CFO/finance with urgent request for wire transfer to attacker-controlled account

nodes.title: Vendor Invoice Redirect
nodes.description: Intercept a real vendor invoice thread and reply with updated bank details for the next payment

nodes.title: Payroll Diversion
nodes.description: Impersonate an employee requesting HR to change their direct deposit to the attacker's account

nodes.title: No Out-of-Band Payment Verification
nodes.description: Organisation lacks policy requiring phone call verification for payment changes above a threshold
